title: Week 3 Day 1 (2/2) — Colab & multimodal
summary: Part 2 of 2 · Colab GPU, **HF_TOKEN** secrets, **diffusion** images, **TTS**, T4 vs A100.

sections.heading: Google Colab basics
sections.remember: Colab = cloud Jupyter + **free GPU** (often **T4**, ~15GB VRAM). Fresh session = re-download models each time.
points: `Shift+Enter` run cell · `!pip install pkg` = shell command (leading `!`).
**Runtime → Disconnect and delete runtime** when done on paid GPUs.

sections.heading: Check GPU
sections.remember: `!nvidia-smi` should show **Tesla T4** and ~15GB — matches Colab resource panel.
points: Run GPU check cell before heavy models.

sections.heading: HF token in Colab (not `.env`)
sections.remember: Colab **Secrets**: name **`HF_TOKEN`**, value `hf_…`, **write** permission, toggle **notebook access** every session.
points: Create: HF avatar → Settings → Access Tokens → **write** (needed for uploads later).

```python
from huggingface_hub import login
from google.colab import userdata
login(userdata.get('HF_TOKEN'))
```
Secrets tie to your Google account — not shared if you share the notebook link.

sections.heading: Diffusion images (`diffusers`)
sections.remember: **Diffusion** models = image generation (not text transformers). **`num_inference_steps`** = denoising iterations.
points: **`pipeline`** from `diffusers` — e.g. Stability **SDXL Turbo** on T4.
Large Hub downloads (GB); GPU RAM spikes when model loads.
**Restart kernel** between big models: Runtime → Restart session.
Two-stage + refiner models can barely fit T4 — may need **A100**.

sections.heading: TTS on Colab
sections.remember: Free **text-to-speech** via `transformers` (e.g. **Microsoft SpeechT5**) — contrast with paid OpenAI TTS in Week 2.
points: Runs on T4 after model download.

sections.heading: T4 vs A100
sections.remember: **A100** ≈ 40GB VRAM, paid Colab (~compute units/hour). Example: **FLUX.1-schnell** ~37GB used — ~$0.04/image in lecture estimate.
points: T4: free tier, great for learning.
Always **disconnect** paid runtime when finished (Manage sessions → Terminate).

cheatSheet: Colab secrets: HF_TOKEN + write + notebook toggle
Restart kernel between huge models · disconnect paid GPU
